ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origin (e.g., regression, classification, clustering) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., csv, database, API) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the dataset (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES origins ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "point_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data point belongs to */,
  "motherset" TEXT /* Name of the motherset (e.g., abalone) */,
  "original_label" INTEGER /* Original label of the data point */,
  "diff_score" REAL /* Difference score of the data point */,
  "ground_truth" TEXT /* Ground truth label (e.g., nominal, anomaly) */,
  "V1" REAL /* Feature 1 value */,
  "V2" REAL /* Feature 2 value */,
  "V3" REAL /* Feature 3 value */,
  "V4" REAL /* Feature 4 value */,
  "V5" REAL /* Feature 5 value */,
  "V6" REAL /* Feature 6 value */,
  "V7" REAL /* Feature 7 value */,
  "noise_1" REAL /* Noise feature 1 value */,
  "noise_2" REAL /* Noise feature 2 value */,
  "noise_3" REAL /* Noise feature 3 value */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data point (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_ground_truth FOREIGN KEY ("ground_truth") REFERENCES labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the origin (e.g., regression, classification, clustering) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the origin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label (e.g., nominal, anomaly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., V1, V2, V3, noise_1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the feature (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Detailed list of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the tag is assigned to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the category is assigned to */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_categories_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_features" (
  "dataset_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset feature */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the feature (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_features_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_features_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)
